A

allCharacters - Variable in class CharacterSearchManager
 
AnalyzePokemonData - Class in Pokedex Analyzer Package
Analyzes Pokemon data from CSV format and extracts character information.
AnalyzePokemonData() - Constructor for class AnalyzePokemonData
Constructs a new AnalyzePokemonData instance.

B

BY_HIT_POINTS - Static variable in class PokemonCharacter
Static Comparator for sorting by hit points
BY_NAME - Static variable in class PokemonCharacter
Static Comparator for sorting by name
BY_SPEED - Static variable in class PokemonCharacter
Static Comparator for sorting by speed

C

CHARACTER_ATTRIBUTES - Static variable in class MyApp
 
CharacterSearchManager - Class in Unnamed Package
Manages character searches based on hit points and speed values.
CharacterSearchManager(ArrayList<PokemonCharacter>) - Constructor for class CharacterSearchManager
 
compareTo(PokemonCharacter) - Method in class PokemonCharacter
Compares this Pokemon to another based on the current sort criteria.
currentSortCriteria - Static variable in class PokemonCharacter
 

D

dataContain - Variable in class MyApp
Contain data within a arraylist that will be used to hold elements within a file
dataLoaded - Variable in class MyApp
 
displayLargestSpeedGroup() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Displays the largest speed group (the speed value with the most characters) If multiple speed groups have the same maximum size, all are displayed
displayResults(TreeSet<PokemonCharacter>) - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Displays a TreeSet of Pokemon characters
displaySpeedStatistics() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Displays statistics about speed distribution Shows number of unique speed values and distribution
displayTop3SpeedGroups() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Displays the top 3 speed groups and lists characters in each group A speed group consists of all characters sharing the same speed value

E

EnglishName - Variable in class PokemonCharacter
 
equals(Object) - Method in class PokemonCharacter
 
EXIT_PROGRAM - Static variable in class MyApp
 

F

FASTEST_SPEED - Static variable in class MyApp
 
fileName - Variable in class ReadData
The name or path of the currently opened file
findHighestHitPoint() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Finds character(s) with the highest hit point value
findHighestSpeed() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Finds character(s) with the highest speed value
findLowestHitPoint() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Finds character(s) with the lowest hit point value
findLowestSpeed() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Finds character(s) with the lowest speed value
findTop3FastestSpeeds() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Finds characters with the top 3 fastest speeds
findTop3SlowestSpeeds() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Finds characters with the top 3 slowest speeds

G

getAllCharacterNames(ArrayList<String>) - Method in class AnalyzePokemonData
Extracts all unique Pokemon character names from the provided data.
getAllCharacterNames(ArrayList<String>) - Method in interface IAnalyzePokemonData
Extracts all unique Pokemon character names from the provided data.
getEnglishName() - Method in class PokemonCharacter
 
getHitPointRange() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Gets the minimum and maximum hit points from all characters
getHitPoints() - Method in class PokemonCharacter
 
getJapaneseName() - Method in class PokemonCharacter
 
getPokedexNumber() - Method in class PokemonCharacter
 
getRawDataList() - Method in interface IReadData
Retrieves the raw data read from the file.
getRawDataList() - Method in class ReadData
Retrieves the raw data read from the file.
getSpeed() - Method in class PokemonCharacter
 
getSpeedDistribution() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Gets all unique speed values and their counts Useful for debugging and analysis
getSpeedRange() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Gets the minimum and maximum speed values from all characters
getType() - Method in class PokemonCharacter
 
getUserInput() - Method in class MenuManager
Safely retrieves integer input from the user.

handleCharacterAttributes() - Method in class MyApp
 
handleHitPointSearch() - Method in class MyApp
 
handleSearchCharacter() - Method in class MyApp
Handles searching for a character by name
handleSpeedSearch() - Method in class MyApp
Handles speed search menu and operations
handleUnitTesting() - Method in class MyApp
Handles the unit testing sub-menu
handleWriteCharacterNames() - Method in class MyApp
Handles writing character names to a file
hashCode() - Method in class PokemonCharacter
Returns the prime number multiplied by the current reselt by 31

HIT_POINT_VAL - Static variable in class MyApp
 
HIT_POINTS - Enum constant in enum class PokemonCharacter.SortBy
 
hitPoints - Variable in class PokemonCharacter

IAnalyzePokemonData - Interface in Unnamed Package
Interface for analyzing Pokemon data extracted from CSV format.

Interface for reading data from files.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class MyApp
methods called within main to handle the menu application
menuManager - Variable in class MyApp
 
MenuManager - Class in Unnamed Package
Manages all menu displays and user input collection.
MenuManager() - Constructor for class MenuManager
Constructs a new MenuManager instance.
MyApp - Class in Unnamed Package
class meant to read input for reading a file menu options fo user to open a file or exit Sub menu to print first and last of a file or write a pokemon file with the names also create a third option to search for a pokemon
MyApp() - Constructor for class MyApp
 

N

NAME - Enum constant in enum class PokemonCharacter.SortBy
 

O

OPEN_FILE - Static variable in class MyApp
 
openDataFile() - Method in class MyApp
Reads in file from pokemon.csv adds data into arrayList of type string calls methods to open data file and read ot
openDataFile(String) - Method in interface IReadData
Opens a data file for reading.
openDataFile(String) - Method in class ReadData
Opens a data file for reading.

P

parseDataIntoPokemon() - Method in class MyApp
Parses raw data and creates PokemonCharacter objects CSV structure: name (index 30), japanese_name (29), hp (28), speed (35), classification (24), pokedex_number (32)
podexNumber - Variable in class PokemonCharacter
 
POKEDEX_NUMBER - Enum constant in enum class PokemonCharacter.SortBy
 
PokemonCharacter - Class in Unnamed Package
Represents a Pokemon character with various attributes.
PokemonCharacter(String, String, int, int, String, int) - Constructor for class PokemonCharacter
 
PokemonCharacter.SortBy - Enum Class in Unnamed Package
 
pokemonList - Variable in class MyApp
 

R

rawDataList - Variable in class ReadData
ArrayList storing the raw data read from the file, one line per element
readData - Variable in class MyApp
 
ReadData - Class in Unnamed Package
Implements file reading functionality for loading data from files.
ReadData() - Constructor for class ReadData
Constructs a new ReadData instance.
readDataFile() - Method in interface IReadData
Reads the contents of a previously opened file.
readDataFile() - Method in class ReadData
Reads the contents of a previously opened file.

RETURN_TO_PREV - Static variable in class MyApp

scnr - Variable in class CharacterSearchManager
 
scnr - Variable in class MenuManager
Scanner instance for reading user input from standard input
scnr - Variable in class MyApp
 
SEARCH_CHARACTER - Static variable in class MyApp
 
searchByHitPointRange() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Searches for characters within a range of hit points Returns results sorted by hit points in ascending order
searchBySpecificHitPoint() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Searches for characters with a specific hit point value Returns results sorted by hit points in ascending order
searchBySpecificSpeed() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Searches for characters with a specific speed value Returns results sorted by speed in ascending order
searchBySpeedRange() - Method in class CharacterSearchManager
Searches for characters within a range of speed values Returns results sorted by speed in ascending order
searchManager - Variable in class MyApp
 
setEnglishName(String) - Method in class PokemonCharacter
 
setHitPoints(int) - Method in class PokemonCharacter
 
setJapaneseName(String) - Method in class PokemonCharacter
 
setPokedexNumber(int) - Method in class PokemonCharacter
 
setSortCriteria(PokemonCharacter.SortBy) - Static method in class PokemonCharacter
Sets the current sorting criteria for all PokemonCharacter comparisons
setSpeed(int) - Method in class PokemonCharacter
 
setType(String) - Method in class PokemonCharacter
 
showCharacterAttributesSpecificHitMenu() - Method in class MenuManager
Displays the menu for searching characters by hit point values.
showCharacterSpeedValueMenu() - Method in class MenuManager
Displays the menu for searching characters by speed values.
showMainMenu() - Method in class MenuManager
Displays the main menu and returns the user's choice.
showSecondarySubMenu() - Method in class MenuManager
Displays the secondary sub menu for character attribute searches.
showSubMenu() - Method in class MenuManager
Displays the sub menu for file operations and returns the user's choice.
